expectations.text: query 훅 이름이 useGet 접두사를 사용한다
expectations.evidence: Hook is named useGetOrderDetail (line 42: 'const useGetOrderDetail = (params: UseGetOrderDetailParams) => {')
File path is hooks/apis/order/queries/useGetOrderDetail/index.ts — domain is 'order', under 'queries' subfolder
Line 42: 'const useGetOrderDetail = (params: UseGetOrderDetailParams) => {' — arrow function syntax
Line 53: 'isLoading: query.isLoading,' in the return object
Line 54: 'error: query.error,' in the return object

expectations.text: page에서 직접적인 fetch/business logic이 없고 훅 소비만 한다
expectations.evidence: No page file was modified (only the hook file appears in outputs). All fetch logic (fetchOrderDetail, endpoint, query key) is encapsulated inside the hook. The hook returns a clean { data, isLoading, error } contract for page-level consumption, ensuring no fetch/business logic leaks to the page.
